_note: CoreLifecycle topic queue (refreshed 2026-07-04, research-backed — see docs/bibles/NEXT_LEVEL_PLAN.md Phase 4). Showrunner pulls the next UNPRODUCED slug top-to-bottom; when exhausted, invent a new one in the same spirit (favor proven-demand drama). Each item has a `format` — the writer maps it to the right title spine + level-label vocab + thumbnail archetype (see AUTOPILOT_PROMPT step 1/4). Every topic here is chosen because an existing video in the niche PROVES demand (`proof`). Frame crime/violence as cautionary dramatized POV, never how-to. Each needs docs/research/<slug>.md before writing.

_formats.rank: Your Life as a [X] at Every Level / at Every Rank  — level labels LEVEL 01…/RANK I…; careers, crime, military, agencies.
_formats.history: Your Life as Every Rank in [Empire]  — historical power ladders; level labels by rank or era.
_formats.scenario: POV: You're a [X]  /  What It's Like to Be a [X]  — a one-off; level labels are escalating DAYS/DECISIONS/MILLIONS, not job ranks.
_formats.survival: Could You Survive [X]?  — level labels are a countdown ladder: HOUR 1 · DAY 3 · WEEK 2 (question-title CTR machine).

queue.title_hint: Every Level of a Startup — From Garage to $1B Unicorn
queue.proof: OUR OWN #1 video: 'Every Level of a Founder — From First Idea to IPO' = 410 views = 41% of ALL channel views (next best: mafia 141). Internal data outranks niche proof.
queue.why: garage -> seed -> Series A -> Series C -> unicorn -> IPO. This is the COMPANY's ladder, not the person's, so it does not repeat the produced 'founder' topic. Aspirational + concrete money rungs + a known destination = the exact shape that made founder outperform.

_learned: PERFORMANCE DATA 2026-07-19 (ops/analytics.json, 33 videos): the winning axis is BUILDER ASPIRATION, not wealth. founder=410 views (41% of channel). But every PASSIVE/ELITE money topic flopped: trillionaire=0, real_estate_mogul=16, billionaire_heir=19, investment_banker=24, hedge_fund_manager=40. Crime is the #2 lane (mob_boss=141, black_market_surgeon=86). PREFER topics the viewer can imagine BECOMING, with concrete money rungs and a known destination. AVOID inherited/passive wealth and elite-finance job ladders — five tested, all flopped.
